objective: Plan the normalized daemon-admitted product surface compiler, honest Systems and Work views, alias retirement, package and extension lifecycle, UX-00, and frozen usability proof.
falsifiable_claim: One registered source can feed shell, catalog, palette, context, and API without fabricating membership or implementation depth, while policy, tenant, context, and alias substitutions fail closed.
exit_criteria: One registered source feeds shell, catalog, palette, context, and API.
Policy, tenant, and context negatives fail; typed aliases preserve deep context; direct subjects remain creatable; UX-00 and the frozen usability bar pass.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M6_PRODUCT_SURFACE_AND_TYPED_WORKSPACES_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute tenant, policy, context, surface release, System binding, alias target, package, extension, deep link, and implementation-depth labels across every projection.
remaining_nonclaims: Screenshot or registry parity does not establish product membership.
No operational-depth claim for unbuilt owners and no stage closure.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
